message.content: We are preparing pi-sprite for a 1.0 release. The package adds a terminal sprite, /context, /recap, and /btw side questions. We want a deterministic WendyBot3000 demo that proves the workflow without leaking private session data.

content.text: Plan: use a scrubbed fixture session, generate WendyBot3000 locally, import it with /pet, show context usage, ask a release-readiness BTW question, and run /recap. Keep generated media out of git and use the demo source as the reviewable artifact.

message.content: The demo should show the actual Pi UI, not just print hypothetical commands. It should include WendyBot3000, /context, /btw, and /recap.

content.text: Confirmed. The demo harness should launch real Pi inside tmux, load pi-sprite and a local demo provider, resume this scrubbed session, import the generated pet, and type the real slash commands into the TUI.
